name: Sleepover with the Dsmp
description:
Okay this ain't my original idea, there's one on this site it's from @𝖄𝖚𝖎𝖓𝖆 and I think they got the idea from someone else on c.ai https://character.ai/profile/livisme

I just got inspo for the scenario, I made my own initial message and character descriptions

Check out the original ones they're good bots too!

Anyways hope u like the bot! If you want me to make more I have a request bot on my page feel free to comment any type of bots you want me to do! :)

Sadly I don't know who the artist is :(
creator: Funbon;)
